objective: Add an accessible empty-state card to the dashboard when there are no projects.
constraints: Must be accessible (ARIA labels, semantic HTML)
acceptance_criteria: Empty list renders title, description, and 'Create project' link
Non-empty list still renders project list correctly
assumptions: Existing dashboard component has a projects array that can be checked for length
skip_rationale: UI change only; no sensitive data, performance bottlenecks, or backend/infra changes involved.
